summary: Verified the new Promotion & Group-Deal Automation Engine (backend + frontend). 12/12 backend pytests pass covering: GET/PUT singleton config + deep-merge, dry_run no-mutation, engine-disabled skip, real run creates auto_created promos+deals + sets active_promotion_id on products, second-run quota respected, /performance structure, /promote-everything validation (100%/100d rejected) and creation, silent_finalize_expired_deals flips deal->fulfilled_silent + participant order awaiting_target->confirmed, and 401/403 auth guards. Frontend Settings Hub /admin/settings-hub?tab=automation_engine renders the SettingsLockGate, unlocks with admin password, and shows the Automation Engine card with Master toggle, Run Now/Dry Run/Promote Everything/Save changes buttons, Promotions card (quota=20, pool=60%, exploration=30%, duration=7, min=200), Group Deals card (cadence=Weekly, target=25, duration=14, display_target=20, pool=20%), and the silent-fulfil banner. Engine state restored to enabled=false and auto_created data cleaned up by teardown.
action_items: Optional: run main-agent self-test of UI flows for Save (master ON persists after refresh), Dry Run toast, and Promote Everything modal — all underlying APIs are confirmed working server-side.
Engine state restored to enabled=false post-test as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: automation_engine_service.py:723-727 — empty `for _ in []: pass` dead loop inside compute_performance_dashboard; harmless but should be removed.
automation_engine_routes.py:34 — _assert_admin uses pyjwt.decode without leeway; consistent with rest of codebase.
_score_products treats products with view_count=0 as views=1.0 to avoid div-by-zero, but this slightly overstates conversion for never-viewed products. Acceptable for a heuristic scorer.

silent_finalize_expired_deals matches orders by group_deal_id == str(_id) (Mongo ObjectId cast). If checkout writes the campaign_id (UUID str) instead of the inserted_id, finalisation would no-op. Worth confirming the order side stores the same key the engine reads.
test_credentials: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd! (also used as SettingsLockGate password)
seed_data_creation: Test inserts a single TEST_AE expired group_deal_campaign + participant order, asserts silent fulfilment, then deletes both. Cleanup also removes any auto_created=true catalog_promotions and group_deal_campaigns from the engine runs and reverts product prices.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_automation_engine_v358.py and reset config defaults at start. Engine is left disabled after run. Frontend verified that the SettingsLockGate unlocks with the admin password and the Automation Engine card with all configured defaults renders correctly. Skipped click-by-click verification of master-toggle persistence, Dry Run toast, and Promote Everything confirm modal — main agent can self-test these (corresponding APIs are all green).
rca of the issue: No defects found. Initial test failures were test-isolation artefacts (singleton-not-reset and wrong DB_NAME in pymongo client — backend uses konekt_db not konekt). After loading /app/backend/.env and resetting the config singleton in fixture, all 12 tests pass.
